untranslatable_reason: Symmetric triangle formation detection requires pattern recognition (visual consolidation with decreasing volatility narrowing to center) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. ATR and Donchian channels provide proxies for volatility decrease and breakout detection, but true triangle pattern identification would require multi-bar geometric analysis not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Used ATR to approximate decreasing volatility (compression phase), and Donchian channels to detect breakout boundaries. This is a reasonable proxy but does not capture the exact geometric symmetric triangle pattern. Reversal exit condition uses Donchian midline as reversion indicator. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries based on breakout direction.
